login.title: Sign in · A1 ARM Control
login.heading: Enter the provisioning console
login.subtitle: Runtime logs and instance credentials are visible only to authorized users.
login.error_locked: Too many attempts. Try again in one minute.

dashboard.task_intro: Configure the instance and start waiting for free capacity.
dashboard.connection_intro: Validate credentials and load availability domains, subnets, images, and free storage quota.
dashboard.resource_status_empty: For a fresh deploy, import the OCI config snippet and PEM private key first.
dashboard.set_boot_size: Set the boot volume size for this instance
dashboard.storage_after_load: Shown after OCI resources are loaded
dashboard.boot_hint: Drag the slider, use the mouse wheel, or type a value
dashboard.ssh_hint_generate: In auto-generate mode, the key is filled after resources load
dashboard.ssh_status_pending: Generated automatically after OCI resources load
dashboard.upload_status_default: Paste a public key above — never paste a private key
dashboard.notify_intro: After the instance is created, send the public IP and login details to your channels.
dashboard.notify_empty_title: You will not be notified when the job finishes
dashboard.notify_empty_body: Add Telegram, Bark, PushPlus, ServerChan, or a self-hosted pusher to receive the public IP immediately.
dashboard.waiting_start: Waiting for a job to start
dashboard.pem_hint: Select the unencrypted .pem file downloaded when you created the API key
dashboard.oci_warning_new: The profile is detected from the snippet. The private key is stored in the server data directory. Enable HTTPS before public deployment.
dashboard.oci_warning_replace: The OCI private key cannot be displayed or edited alone. Resubmit the full config snippet and matching private key; the existing credentials will be replaced entirely.

logs_page.title: Runtime logs · A1 ARM Control
logs_page.heading: Runtime logs
logs_page.intro: Watch capacity waiting, instance creation, and notification delivery in a dedicated view.

settings_page.title: Settings · A1 ARM Control
settings_page.heading: Settings
settings_page.intro: Manage OCI API connectivity and admin access credentials.
settings_page.oci_card_intro: Used to load resources and create Ampere A1 instances.
settings_page.pem_hint: Select the unencrypted PEM private key downloaded when you created the API key
settings_page.oci_warning_new: The profile is detected from the snippet. The private key is stored in the server data directory.
settings_page.oci_warning_replace: Submitting replaces both the existing config and API private key. The old key is never displayed.
settings_page.password_intro: The next sign-in will use the new password.
settings_page.new_password_hint: At least 8 characters; a password manager is recommended

notify_editor.copy_add: Configure {name} to send results when the job succeeds.
notify_editor.copy_edit: Update connection details and delivery state for {name}.
notify_editor.default_copy: Choose a delivery method, then fill in connection details.
notify_editor.pick_hint: Already-added channels can still be edited
notify_editor.footer_note: Connection details are used only for this page and job; they are never written to runtime logs
notify_editor.enable_hint: Messages include public IP, login user, and SSH port
notify_editor.telegram_desc: Receive job results via a Telegram bot
notify_editor.feishu_desc: Post to a Feishu group bot
notify_editor.dingtalk_desc: Post to a DingTalk group bot
notify_editor.wecom_desc: Post to a WeCom group bot
notify_editor.generic_desc: POST JSON to a custom URL
notify_editor.bot_token_hint: Create a bot with BotFather to obtain this.
notify_editor.bark_key_hint: Copy the device key from the Bark app.
notify_editor.pushplus_token_hint: Get the token from PushPlus; Topic is optional for group send.
notify_editor.pushplus_topic_ph: Leave empty to push to the current WeChat
notify_editor.serverchan_hint: Copy the SendKey from the ServerChan dashboard.
notify_editor.ntfy_server_hint: Public ntfy.sh works, or use your own server.
notify_editor.smtp_pass_hint: QQ, 163, and similar mailboxes usually need an app password, not the web login password.
notify_editor.webhook_url_hint: Paste the full webhook URL from the platform.
notify_editor.webhook_note: Each job keeps one webhook channel; choosing another bot replaces the current webhook.

errors.pem_required: Select the PEM private key downloaded when creating the OCI API key
errors.test_message: A1 Control notification test: if you receive this message, the channel is configured correctly.
errors.password_short: New password must be at least 8 characters
errors.password_same: New password must differ from the current password
errors.display_name_invalid: Display name must start with a letter and contain only lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens
errors.spec_not_number: Instance shape values must be numbers
errors.ocpu_range: Free A1 OCPU must be between 1 and 2
errors.memory_range: Free A1 memory must be between OCPU count and 12 GB
errors.boot_range: Boot volume must be between 50 and 200 GB
errors.ssh_public_required: Enter a valid SSH public key — do not paste an OCI API private key
errors.retry_not_number: Retry interval must be a number
errors.retry_range: Retry interval must be between 1 and 300 seconds
errors.email_port_number: SMTP port must be a number
errors.tg_host_invalid: Telegram API host must not include a protocol or path
errors.tg_required: Bot token and Chat ID are required when Telegram is enabled
errors.bark_required: Device key is required when Bark is enabled
errors.pushplus_required: Token is required when PushPlus is enabled
errors.serverchan_required: SendKey is required when ServerChan is enabled
errors.gotify_required: Server URL and app token are required when Gotify is enabled
errors.ntfy_required: Topic name is required when ntfy is enabled
errors.webhook_required: Webhook URL is required when webhook is enabled
errors.email_host_port: SMTP server or port is invalid
errors.email_security_invalid: Email encryption mode is not supported
errors.email_required: SMTP account, password, from, and to are required when email is enabled
errors.field_url: {field} must be a valid HTTP or HTTPS URL
errors.config_format: Invalid config snippet. Paste multi-line content with [DEFAULT] or [Profile name]
errors.config_single_profile: The config snippet must contain exactly one profile
errors.pem_invalid_file: Select a valid PEM private key file
errors.pem_read_failed: Unable to read the PEM private key. Use the unencrypted key downloaded when creating the OCI API key
errors.pem_fingerprint: PEM private key does not match the fingerprint in the OCI config
errors.ssh_missing: SSH private key does not exist

job.target: Target: {name} / {ocpus} OCPU / {memory} GB memory / {boot} GB boot volume
job.network_retry: OCI network request failed ({error}), retrying in {seconds}s
job.rate_limited: Rate limited; retry interval set to {seconds}s

js.waiting_start: Waiting for a job to start
js.invalid_pubkey: Invalid format: use ssh-ed25519, ssh-rsa, or ECDSA public keys
js.pubkey_ready: Public key ready — you can start creation
js.pubkey_paste: Paste a public key above — never paste a private key
js.key_download_requested: Private key download requested — store it safely
js.ssh_ph_upload: Paste one or more SSH public keys, e.g. ssh-ed25519 AAAA…
js.ssh_hint_generate: In auto-generate mode, the key is filled after resources load
js.ssh_hint_upload: Paste one or more SSH public keys — never paste a private key
js.pubkey_too_large: Public key file must not exceed 64 KB
js.pubkey_file_invalid: File is not a valid SSH public key — choose a .pub file
js.config_changed: Connection settings changed. Load OCI resources again.
js.boot_hint: Range 50–{max} GB · slider, wheel, or type a value
js.storage_insufficient: Only {available} GB free block storage left — not enough for a {minimum} GB boot volume
js.resources_summary: {cache}{region} · {subnets} public subnets · {families} OS families · {storage} GB free storage
js.loading_resources: Validating API config and querying regional resources…
js.fill_before_test: Fill required connection fields before sending a test.
js.fill_required: Fill the required connection fields for this channel.
js.download_key_first: Download the instance login private key first
js.paste_pubkey_first: Paste or choose a valid SSH public key
js.copy_failed: Copy failed — select the log text manually
js.confirm_replace_oci: This will replace the existing OCI config and API private key. Continue?
js.oci_warning_replace: The OCI private key cannot be displayed or edited alone. Resubmit the full config snippet and matching private key; the existing credentials will be replaced entirely.
js.telegram_desc: Receive job results via a Telegram bot
js.feishu_desc: Post to a Feishu group bot
js.dingtalk_desc: Post to a DingTalk group bot
js.wecom_desc: Post to a WeCom group bot
js.generic_desc: POST JSON to a custom URL
js.copy_edit: Update connection details and delivery state for {name}.
js.copy_add: Configure {name} to send results when the job succeeds.
